# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ${{ runner.tool_cache }}/pip
            config-files
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Build
        run: |
          # Add build commands here

      - name: Save config files to cache
        run: |
          mkdir config-files
          cp path/to/config-files/* config-files/
